pages.text: $(bold)Brown Mushroom Seed$()$(br2)A towering brown mushroom tree. Grows on mycelium.
pages.title: Brown Mushroom Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Mycelium$() → $(italic)Brown Mushroom$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
